name: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in productivity. We automate the onboarding process instead of manual onboarding processes and email updates.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding process for new hires
